ham.subject: Transaction Alert – Your Recent Debit
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We would like to inform you that a transaction of $1,250.00 was successfully processed from your account ending in 4827 on 07/04/2026 at 14:23:08 UTC. The payment was made to "Acme & Co. Services" and was authorized by your card.

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognise this activity, please contact our 24/7 support line immediately at 1‑800‑BANK‑HELP or visit your online banking portal to review your recent activity. Your security is our top priority.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,

Customer Support Team

Bank of Global Finance

spam.subject: URGENT: Scholarship Award Confirmation – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application has been selected for the prestigious Global Scholars Fellowship at the University of Global Studies. We are pleased to offer you a full‑ride scholarship covering tuition, housing, and a monthly stipend of $1,500 for the next four academic years.

To finalize your enrollment, we require verification of your personal information and the completion of a mandatory scholarship agreement. Please provide the following details:

1. Full legal name
2. Date of birth
3. Nationality
4. Student ID (if available)
5. Confirmation of acceptance by signing the attached agreement

Kindly submit the signed agreement and a scanned copy of your passport or government ID by clicking the link below. Failure to complete these steps within 48 hours will result in the forfeiture of your scholarship offer.

<URL>

We look forward to welcoming you to our academic community and supporting your future success.

Best regards,

Dr. Elena Martinez
Director, Global Scholars Fellowship
University of Global Studies

P.S. This offer is exclusive and must be accepted promptly. Thank you for your cooperation.
